chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.86 of 2022 Syed Muhammad Younus Qadri & another Versus Muhammad Fayyaz & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order on CMA 3434/22 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA 3435/22 Dated: 10.01.2024 None present. -.-.- This matter is pending since October 2022 and twice it was fixed earlier when on the first date counsel for appellants was called absent whereas on the next date Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Advocate held his brief. Today is the third date and no one is in attendance on behalf of appellants. There is no intimation either. It seems that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant First Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
